name: Student Package — 4D3N Ijen + Papuma + Tumpak Sewu + Bromo
description: ISIC student rate for 4-day full East Java circuit: Ijen Blue Fire crater, Papuma Beach, Tumpak Sewu waterfall, and Bromo sunrise. Same safety standards: HPWKI-registered guides, mandatory health screening (BBKSDA SE.1658/KSA.9/2024). ISIC Provider ID 259268. Licensed operator NIB 1102230032918.
touristType: International students with verified ISIC card

item.name: Day 1 — Surabaya to Bondowoso + Ijen Screening
item.description: Private transfer from Surabaya to Bondowoso. Health screening on arrival (BBKSDA SE.1658/KSA.9/2024). Dinner and overnight.

item.name: Day 2 — Ijen Blue Fire + Papuma Beach
item.description: Midnight departure to Paltuding base. Guided ascent to Kawah Ijen (2,386 m). Blue Fire observation. Gas masks and trekking poles provided. Descent, breakfast, transfer south to Papuma Beach. Free time at the white-sand beach and cape headland. Overnight in Jember/Lumajang area.

item.name: Day 3 — Tumpak Sewu Waterfall + Transfer to Bromo
item.description: Tumpak Sewu waterfall (~120 m curtain waterfall). Optional canyon descent. Transfer to Bromo area. Overnight at Bromo-area hotel.

item.name: Day 4 — Bromo Sunrise + Return to Surabaya
item.description: Penanjakan viewpoint for Bromo sunrise over the Tengger caldera. Private 4WD jeep to crater base. Return to Surabaya for drop-off.

offers.description: ISIC student pricing per person: IDR 7,150,000 (solo) · IDR 4,100,000 (2 pax) · IDR 3,900,000 (3) · IDR 3,600,000 (4–5) · IDR 3,350,000 (6–7) · IDR 3,000,000 (8–10) · IDR 2,900,000 (11+). All-inclusive: private transport, 3 nights accommodation + breakfast, entrance fees, Bromo jeep, Ijen gas masks, health screening, water, T-shirt.
